title: Principal Plant Manager at Carrier India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Carrier India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
We at Carrier India Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Carrier India Asia Pacific Associates:
Carrier India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Carrier India Asia Pacific Associates!
